description: Implement src/tools/health.ts registering 4 tools that call the health handler functions. score_component returns JSON with score, grade, dimensions, issues, timestamp. score_all_components maps over all components. get_health_trend returns dataPoints array with trend direction and changePercent. get_health_diff returns before/after comparison with improvement/regression verdict. Write tests for the tool layer — verify output shape, verify grade calculation (A=90+, B=80+, C=70+, D=60+, F=below 60), verify trend direction logic edge cases (single data point = stable, two identical scores = stable).
title: Health tools — score_component, score_all_components, get_health_trend, get_health_diff
